normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU1_feasible_witness (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat)
  (hal : ws.length = vs.length) :
  ∃ sel : Selection,
    ValidSelection ws sel ∧
    totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap ∧
    totalValue vs sel = knapsack01 ws vs cap
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: When weights and values align, some valid selection achieves the returned optimum within the capacity.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU4_global_optimal (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat) (sel : Selection)
  (hal : ws.length = vs.length)
  (hv : ValidSelection ws sel)
  (hw : totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap) :
  totalValue vs sel ≤ knapsack01 ws vs cap
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: No feasible selection within the capacity beats the returned optimum.
